title: Chains of Justice
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}} {{IndividualShip |image= |name=''Chains of Justice'' |designer= |manufacturer=Kuat Drive Yards |line= |model= |type=[[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] |cost= |modifier= |sysmods= |length=1,600 meters |width= |height= |mass= |max accel= |mglt= |max speed= |maneuverability= |engine= |hyperdrive=2 |hdrange= |hdsystem= |poweroutput= |power= |shield gen= |hull= |sensor= |target= |navigation= |avionics= |maincomp= |countermeasures= |armament= |complement= |bays= |escapepods= |crew= |skeleton= |passengers= |capacity= |cargohandling= |consumables= |lifesupport= |communications= |othersystems= |role= |commission= |destroyed= |retired= |battles=[[Battle of Selaggis]], 7.5 ABY |affiliation=[[Galactic Empire]] [[Zsinj's Empire|Zsinj's empire]] |navy= |fleet=[[Group Three (Zsinj)|Group Three]] |owners=[[Zsinj]] |captains= |crewmembers= |registry= |aliases= }} {{Quote|I got through to the ''Chains of Justice''. Group Three had not yet entered hyperspace at Vahaba. The entire Group Three is en route to us now."
"We might not only survive—we may have just won this engagement, Captain. Thank you.|Captain Vellar and Warlord Zsinj|''[[X-Wing: Solo Command]]''}} '''''Chains of Justice''''' was an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]], part of [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]]'s fleet. It often paired with the [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] ''[[Venom]]''. It fought at the [[Battle of Selaggis]] to help protect Zsinj and his damaged flagship [[Iron Fist (Executor-class)|''Iron Fist'']] but was forced to retreat when forces under the command of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] destroyed the ''Venom''. ==Behind the scenes== ''Chains of Justice'' was introduced in [[Aaron Allston]]'s ''[[X-Wing: Solo Command]]'', the seventh book in the [[Star Wars: X-Wing (novel series)|X-wing series]]. It later received a brief entry in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', published in [[2008]]. ==Appearances== *''[[X-Wing: Solo Command]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Solo Command (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Imperial-class Star Destroyers]] [[Category:Starships of Zsinj's Empire]]
